title: Konjalaai Lyrics Yatchan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Yatchan Konjalaai Song Lyrics
Artist(s): Yuvan Shankar Raja & Tanvi Shah
Music: Yuvan Shankar Raja

Azhage unnai paarthen
Asandhey naanm ponen
Idhazhey, eera idhazhey
Ayyayo naanum saaindhen

Chi podi unmugam kodi
nilavena minnum appadi minnum
Unai ottikollavum urasi
kollavumn yengum en manam yengum.

Nee pogum paadhayil unnai thodarven
Salai engilum dhoosaai
konjam konjalaai ennai kolvaaya

Oh oh oonjalaai nenjorathil
 saingaalathile aadinaai,
Manjalaai thoo vaanathile
nee dhane therindhaai (2 times)

Enaena thaniyaai nadai paadhai
Adhil ennai en nizhalaai pin thodarndhaai
Or oruvindri thavidhidum ulagathiley
Enakaaga yengum pudhu uravum Neeyaaaa..

Adi ena enakenna aachu
Thalai keezhaai naatkalum pochu
Kadaisi paerundhukaaga
nirkum payani naan dhano.

Inam puriya inbam thunbam
Rendum ondraai endhan nenjil
yeno thaano endre aanenadi

Oru muthathaale
Ennai thithithaale
Imai orathale, veesi veesi pogiraai.

Ellam maari pochu
Ada yedho pudhusa aachu
Idhai veliye solla theriyadhamma
Konjam konjammma..

Nee Nee yaaradi
Ulla kallayum
veliye poovayum veesinaai
Pongadi kondatathile
rendaai nirkireney (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Konjalaai?

The song captures a romantic and soothing theme, expressing love and longing.

Who are the singers of Konjalaai?

The song is sung by Tanvi Shah and Yuvan.

What is the context of the song in the movie Yatchan?

The song is set in a romantic context, highlighting the emotions between the lead characters.

Who wrote the lyrics for Konjalaai?

The lyrics were penned by Pa Vijay.

When was the movie Yatchan released?

The movie was released in 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Konjalaai is a romantic melody from the movie Yatchan, beautifully sung by Tanvi Shah and Yuvan. The song's lyrics, written by Pa Vijay, express deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of a heartfelt connection. Set against a soothing musical backdrop, it evokes feelings of warmth and affection. This track perfectly complements the romantic moments in the film, making it a memorable addition to the soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Konjalaai from the movie Yatchan is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully blends Tanvi Shah's enchanting voice with Yuvan's soulful melodies. The song captures the essence of romance and longing, making it a perfect listen for those special moments. Dive into the world of love and emotions with this captivating track that stands out in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Beauty, I saw you and I was stunned. Lips, wet lips, oh no, I also leaned in.
Hey, your face shines like a crescent moon, shining like that. My heart wants to hold you close and embrace you everywhere.
I will follow you on the path you walk. Even if it's a street, will you take me along like a breeze?
Oh oh, like a swing in my heart, you danced in the evening. Like a yellow flower in the sky, you appeared.
Why do you walk alone on the path? You follow me like my shadow. In a world that struggles without anyone, you are a new connection for me.
Hey, what happened to me? Days have gone upside down. I am the traveler waiting for the last train.
Understanding happiness and sadness, both became one in my heart, and I became like this.
With a kiss, you scolded me. From the corner of your eye, you keep moving away.
Everything has changed. Something new has happened. I don't know how to express it outside, just a little bit.
Who are you? You blew away the stone inside and the flower outside. In the celebration, I stand as two.
